name: SHL Global Skills Assessment
description: SHL's Global Skills Assessment measures 96 behavioral skills in 15 minutes. Objective data for onboarding, upskilling, reskilling, and workforce planning.
sections: We already have our own competency framework. Why would we use the SHL Universal Competency Framework (UCF)?
How does this help with upskilling and reskilling?
How does skills data from hiring get used later in development or mobility?
Is there evidence the GSA predicts performance?
What does "globally normed" mean for my organization?
